brand.name:
Joana
Pinto
home.about.p1: I'm a multimedia artist based in Porto, driven by a curiosity for people and the stories they carry. I believe cinema is where all art forms meet, and that intersection is what excites me most as it's the space I've been building towards. I'm endlessly curious and always looking to learn from the people I meet along the way.

filmes.title: Films
filmes.subtitle: Visual narratives in motion.
filmes.item1.name: Entre Nós
filmes.item1.subtitle: Short Film
filmes.item1.copy: "Entre Nós" is a film about two people who share the same space without ever meeting.
filmes.item1.copy.col1: This short film explores the fractured relationship between two brothers, Lu and Vitor, who symbolically reconnect through their childhood home, left behind by their now-deceased parents. Although they never physically cross paths, both revisit the space, which Lu sees as a refuge, and Vitor as a place of confrontation with regret. Through an introspective narrative, the film offers a reflection on grief, emotional distance and the possibility of symbolic reconciliation, using the house as a metaphor for family ties that have been lost but remain latent.
filmes.item1.copy.col2:
Developed as a final degree project, 'Entre Nós' is a short film directed and produced in collaboration with Maria Miguel Silva and Hien Ahn Tran. The opportunity to develop this project arose at a time of transition, when it became essential to seize every opportunity. Above all, it stemmed from the desire to begin building a meaningful path for ourselves as artists.

• Screenplay, Co-direction, Co-production, Camera Work, Editing, Sound Design
filmes.item2.name: Living Tales
filmes.item2.subtitle: Commercial Video
filmes.item2.copy: "Living Tales" is an artistic video that aims to explore and highlight the conceptual world of the Munna Design brand.
filmes.item2.copy.col1: This project involves the production of an artistic video lasting around three minutes and six short videos focusing on the brand's products for commercial purposes. We aim to explore a visual world where the classical and the dreamlike merge into a single universe, following the journey of two characters who, upon discovering the furniture, encounter a new reality, emerging into an environment where 'classics' take on a new meaning.
filmes.item2.copy.col2:
The contrast between the house's classical architecture and the new approach to the furniture's characteristic style not only highlights MUNNA's craftsmanship but also emphasises the inspiration that cultural heritage offers the brand. In this way, the videos not only promote the products but also reinforce MUNNA's identity as a link between tradition and innovation in interior design.

• Co-direction, Co-production, Camera operation, VFX
filmes.item3.name: Today Is The Day!
filmes.item3.subtitle: under development
filmes.item3.copy: With toy guns in their pockets and a fever in their bones, three old men make their way through the night towards the flames that will change them forever.
filmes.item3.copy.col1: In a cramped, lamplit cafe on a winding street, three old men stuff themselves and dance as if fleeing death itself. A fortune-teller appears to seal their fate, and they set off into the thick, dark night. With toy pistols in their pockets and a fever in their bones. Their quest leads them to a house ablaze, which they enter one by one, with silent reverence, forever transformed by the flames.
filmes.item3.copy.col2:
Directed by Michał Wilk, this film is about men who have outgrown their own sense of wonder - and about a night when they rediscover it. The story moves from the theatricality of the banquet to the silence of the fire: a ritual of transformation, performed with unflinching ferocity. The project is currently in pre-production, with filming scheduled for May 2026.

• Production, Casting director, Assistant director
fotografia.title: Photography
fotografia.subtitle: Frames between daily life and the fleeting moment.
fotografia.item1.name: Analógico
fotografia.item1.copy: Photography has the power to make moments last. Shooting on film forces me to slow down, to be more present, more aware of the world around me. This selection reflects my interest in the everyday and the small moments - the ones we so often walk past. The ones I believe deserve more attention.
fotografia.item2.name: Falcon Quest
fotografia.item2.copy: A boat trip that explores the bond between man and the sea.

analog.title: Analog
analog.subtitle: Memories in film, grain, and light.
pdb.intro: One of my most recent professional challenges was capturing the 4th edition of Porto Design Biennale, themed Time is Present. Designing the Common - a project with a real and lasting impact on communities. This selection is a small glimpse of what the Biennale was.
falcon.copy.col1: In this photobook, I aim to explore the intense relationship that Pedro Oliveira has with the sea. A relationship of such intensity that, as well as living the sea-having sailed to different parts of the world and competing in regattas every month with his boat Falcon Quest-he also lives on the sea... on his boat, which brings him more comfort than any house could.
falcon.copy.col2:
For Pedro, sleeping on the boat is like when he was a child and fell asleep in his mother's arms... for him, "it's the same swaying". When he returns to the boat after a few days, he "gives it a little pat" to greet it.

"It's like a friend... it's an extension of yourself. It's a body and you're the heart that pumps the engine and keeps it going."
t1.copy.col1: T1 Jams was launched as an initiative created by Eduardo Hora, Guilherme Aguiar and Joana Pinto with the aim of promoting new emerging artists from Porto. More than just a concert, it is a space for sharing and expression for lovers of music and art where, in an intimate setting, the artist and the audience are part of creating a moment in which the present takes precedence over everything else.
t1.copy.col2:
The first edition featured performances by ManWillOnly and Lopo Romão.
